full_text:
Lu Su (Zijing) 魯肅 (子敬)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Su (魯肅), styledZijing (子敬), was born in Dong Cheng County, Lin Huai Commandery (Presently Hui Ning in Jiang Su Province). Brilliant and insightful Wu commander. Was ambassador to Shu. Lu Su was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Su lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
